chunks.page_summary: A technical drawing detailing the dimensions, flange specifications, and EHEDG compliance criteria for the Rheonics SRV EHEDG short viscometer probe.
chunks.extracted_text:
Units: mm [inch]
SRV EHEDG short

Specify flange in Order.
Available sizes are as follows:
DIN11853-1/2/3, Nominal diameter >=DN40
DIN11864-1/2/3, Nominal diameter >=DN40
DIN 11851, Nominal diameter >=DN40
ISO 2852 (DIN 32676 B), Nominal diameter >=DN40
Others; Variline®, BoiControl®, etc.

For EHEDG compliance the criterion:
D-14mm>L must be fulfilled

All wetted surfaces are < Ra 0.8

Schnitt A-A

inline process density and viscosity monitoring
key_facts: The SRV EHEDG short product requires specifying the flange type in the order.
Available flange sizes for DIN11853-1/2/3, DIN11864-1/2/3, DIN 11851, and ISO 2852 (DIN 32676 B) have a nominal diameter greater than or equal to DN40.
Other available flange types include Variline® and BoiControl®.
For EHEDG compliance, the criterion D-14mm > L must be fulfilled.
All wetted surfaces must have a roughness value less than Ra 0.8.
Rheonics specializes in inline process density and viscosity monitoring.
